name: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We automate renewal task reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendar reminders.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking vendor contract expirations and managing renewals.

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking vendor contract expirations and managing renewals.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We automate renewal task reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendar reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendar reminders

one_liner: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We automate renewal task reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendar reminders.
